evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: establishing data quality and governance controls; data governance implementation experience; CI/CD familiarity
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Data quality, governance, and CI/CD are core responsibilities, indicating strong rigour focus.
evidence.domain_risk: Broadcast media company; no financial/compliance/regulatory language
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Media production without explicit regulatory context suggests moderate risk from data quality perspective.
evidence.collaboration_width_evidence: No named teams mentioned; only generic data platform responsibilities
evidence.data_team_maturity: building and scaling a modern data platform; production-level data governance; semantic modeling
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Mature: Advanced data infrastructure with orchestration (Airflow), semantic modeling, and production-level governance.
evidence.jd_authorship: designing orchestration workflows using Airflow; developing models with dbt; implementing data transformations; building dimensional models; configuring BigQuery datasets; establishing data quality and governance controls
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise technical methodology (Airflow, dbt, BigQuery, dimensional modeling) with specific implementation context indicates hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: building and scaling a modern data platform; analytics modeling
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Internal data platform focus indicates internal_data orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Multiple ownership verbs (designing workflows, building models, establishing governance) indicate strategic responsibility.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools or infrastructure expectations.
evidence.testing_framing: Hands-on dbt expertise (models, tests, macros); establishing data quality and governance controls
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing and data quality are owned responsibilities, not just tools listed.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: data quality and governance controls; production-level data governance implementation
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: High: Data quality and governance language dominates, reflecting concern about data reliability in production systems.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: building and scaling a modern data platform; implementing data transformations
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Scaling and implementing suggest mix approaching fix_scale.
